declaration: All design artifacts in artifacts/design/j2/ comply with Canon LAW 1, 2, 9, 11, 23-27 and RULE 1-5. Zero production code written. Zero modifications to core/ or tests/.

laws.title: IInterface Compliance
laws.evidence_detail: All 4 enterprise protocols (ITenantRouter, IUsageMeter, IBillingEngine, IComplianceAuditor) defined as typing.Protocol with @runtime_checkable. Each has 4 async methods with full type annotations and docstring return schemas.

laws.title: Concretion Over Abstraction
laws.evidence_detail: All 16 protocol methods return concrete Dict[str, Any] or None — no abstract return types. All data models are concrete dataclasses with explicit fields. No abstract base classes defined.
covered_items: 16 protocol methods with concrete Dict[str, Any] return types
6 concrete dataclasses (TenantContext, UsageRecord, BillingInvoice, AuditLogEntry, QuotaSnapshot, ComplianceReport)
0 abstract base classes in design artifacts

laws.title: Governance Independence
laws.law_ref: LAW-9 — Governance MUST NOT depend on runtime
laws.evidence_detail: ITenantRouter governance (isolation_policy, quota enforcement) is policy-driven, not runtime-dependent. IBillingEngine manages payment state transitions without coupling to payment execution. IComplianceAuditor validates against frameworks without runtime dependency. All governance is driven by model state (TenantContext.isolation_policy, TenantContext.pricing_tier), not runtime conditions.
covered_items: IBillingEngine — state machine governance without payment coupling
Leakage Guards G-L1-G-L5 — all policy-gated, not runtime-gated

laws.title: No Global Mutable State
laws.evidence_detail: Every design artifact enforces instance-scoped state. TenantContext is per-tenant (independent instance). IUsageMeter state is instance-scoped per meter instance. IBillingEngine billing state is instance-scoped. No global tenant registry, no global billing ledger, no global audit log defined. Leakage Guard G-L3 requires isolation_boundary != None (no shared state assumption). TenantContext carries its own enterprise_trace_id_seed — never shared.
covered_items: G-L3 metering guard requires isolation_boundary != None

laws.title: Traceability (enterprise_trace_id)
laws.law_ref: LAW-12 — Every operation carries trace ID
laws.evidence_detail: All 16 protocol methods accept enterprise_trace_id. All return schemas include trace_id in response. All 4 data models (UsageRecord, BillingInvoice, AuditLogEntry, QuotaSnapshot) carry enterprise_trace_id field. Correlation ID hierarchy (P-R1–P-R6) ensures full back-traceability from F4 Observability to root SDK operation. enterprise_trace_id format: 'entr_' + SHA-256(session + ts)[:28].
covered_items: 4 data models — all carry enterprise_trace_id field
6 propagation rules (P-R1–P-R6) defined in integration blueprint
Correlation ID hierarchy: SDK -> F1 -> J2 Router -> Meter -> Billing -> Audit -> F4

laws.title: Service Ownership — Multi-Tenant Isolation
laws.evidence_detail: TenantIsolationPolicy (STRICT/SHARED/ISOLATED) defines ownership boundary. ITenantRouter owns routing domain exclusively. IUsageMeter partitions data by tenant_id. G-L1 prevents cross-tenant data leakage unless shared_resource_flag AND scope_verified. G-L3 enforces metering boundary — meter records are scoped to executing_tenant_id. TenantContext encapsulates all per-tenant config (quota, pricing, compliance flags).
covered_items: G-L1 cross-tenant access guard (shared_resource_flag AND scope_verified)
TenantContext — all tenant config in one instance

laws.title: Service Ownership — Usage & Billing
laws.evidence_detail: IUsageMeter records operations with cost_units (Decimal for precision). IBillingEngine applies pricing tier rules via apply_pricing_tier. ResourceType enum defines accountable resources (DAG_EXECUTION, API_THROUGHPUT, STORAGE_GB, MODEL_INFERENCE, CONCURRENT_WORKERS). QuotaSnapshot captures resource consumption state. PricingTier enum (FREE/STARTER/PROFESSIONAL/ENTERPRISE/CUSTOM) maps to billing rates. G-L2 enforces quota exhaustion guard.

laws.title: Service Ownership — Payment State Machine
laws.evidence_detail: PaymentState enum defines 6 states (PENDING, PROCESSING, PAID, FAILED, DISPUTED, WRITTEN_OFF). Billing State Machine in 03_tenant_isolation_machine.md §4 defines all valid transitions with guards. IBillingEngine.process_payment_state validates transitions. IBillingEngine.suspend_on_default triggers tenant suspension on payment default. G-L5 suspension guard checks overdue threshold and prevents double-suspension.
covered_items: Billing State Machine — all transitions with guards

laws.title: Service Ownership — Compliance Frameworks
laws.evidence_detail: ComplianceFramework enum defines 5 frameworks (GDPR, SOC2, HIPAA, PCI_DSS, ISO_27001). IComplianceAuditor.validate_gdpr_soc2_compliance validates entries against specified framework. AuditLogEntry carries compliance_framework field. ComplianceReport captures framework-specific results. Compliance Report State Machine (§5) covers full lifecycle from COLLECTING to ARCHIVED. AuditRetentionPolicy (P30D/P90D/P365D/INDEFINITE) per framework requirements.

laws.title: Service Ownership — Audit Identity & Verification
laws.evidence_detail: AuditLogEntry carries entry_id (unique), compliance_hash (SHA-256 for verifiability), and retention_policy. Deterministic Audit Guard G-A1 computes SHA-256(tenant_id + action + actor + target_resource + compliance_framework + retention_policy) ensuring same inputs always yield same hash. AuditAction enum defines 9 semantic actions. IComplianceAuditor.archive_logs moves entries to cold storage with TTL. G-A1 protects against Non-Deterministic Audit Drift with hash verification.
covered_items: G-A1 Deterministic Audit Guard — hash formula and verification

rules.title: Determinism
rules.evidence_detail: UsageRecord.__post_init__ generates record_hash deterministically from (tenant_id, operation_type, cost_units, trace_id). AuditLogEntry.__post_init__ generates compliance_hash deterministically from (tenant_id, action, actor, target_resource, framework, retention). G-A1 ensures same audit inputs -> same hash. G-M1 (Deterministic Metering Guard) ensures same meter inputs -> same record. Integration blueprint §6 specifies determinism thresholds for all operations.

rules.title: Input Validation
rules.evidence_detail: P-R5 requires enterprise_trace_id to be non-empty (min 8 chars). IBillingEngine.apply_pricing_tier validates usage_aggregate values via RULE 2. Invoice total_amount validated before generation. All protocol methods specify typed parameters (str, Decimal, datetime.date) preventing uncontrolled input. Integration blueprint §6 specifies idempotency keys for all operations ensuring safe retry.

rules.title: Safety Guards
rules.evidence_detail: 5 Leakage Guards (G-L1–G-L5) defined with explicit conditions and violation responses. G-L1: cross-tenant access requires shared_resource_flag AND scope_verified AND target.policy != STRICT. G-L2: quota exhaustion blocks operation. G-L3: metering requires tenant_id match and isolation_boundary. G-L4: billing flush verifies record integrity. G-L5: suspension prevents double-suspension. Each guard has Canon ref and violation event.

rules.title: Trace Propagation
rules.evidence_detail: Correlation ID hierarchy (§2) defines 6 propagation rules (P-R1–P-R6). enterprise_trace_id flows from SDK/CLI through F1 → J2 Router → Meter → Billing → Audit → F4 Observability. Each layer extends the trace chain with segment suffix. All protocol methods accept and return enterprise_trace_id. 10 event hooks (H1–H10) all carry trace_id in payload.
covered_items: Trace chain: SDK → F1 → Router → Meter → Billing → Audit → F4
10 event hooks with trace_id in payload

rules.title: Rollback & Recovery
rules.evidence_detail: Integration blueprint §6 defines rollback actions for 6 failure points: quota enforcement (reverse deduction), meter record (discard), invoice generation (delete stored artifact), compliance validation (reject entries), payment state transition (revert to previous), billing flush (no-op if already flushed). Each rollback is self-contained with no side effects.
covered_items: Invoice generation rollback — delete stored artifact
Payment state rollback — revert to previous state
Billing flush rollback — no-op if already flushed

stop_conditions.condition: All 4 enterprise protocols designed with typing.Protocol
Leakage Guards prevent tenant_A accessing tenant_B data without scope_verified
Integration blueprint maps to F1 API, I1 Infra, F4 Observability
Canon Compliance Matrix maps 100% to LAW 1, 2, 9, 11, 23-27 & RULE 1-5
Zero modifications to core/ or tests/
All delivery files present in artifacts/design/j2/
